title: AI is Changing Tech Dev Markets - What Comes Next?
description: AI is already replacing some developer jobs. Here's what worries me about the new generation entering tech.

title: Let's talk about Odysseus, the PewDiePie "AI Workspace"
description: Everyone's hyping PewDiePie's Odysseus. Almost nobody read the code. A look at what's really inside and what that says about tech media.
